10659482.title: Written In Blood
10659482.description: Crime novelist Simon Toyne examines some of the darkest real-life crime stories. He investigates the similarities between the works of famous writers and the grim realities of true crime.

10660318.title: Judge Judy
10660318.description: A woman sues her daughter and new son-in-law for back rent and car expenses. They claim she's just mad that they got married.

10660407.title: Cheaters
10660407.description: Robley frets when his wife starts going out with her friends every night; Sharon and Jerome have six kids between them, but he doesn't want to play happy families.

10661326.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10661326.description: Robert Benjamin Rhoades, also known as The Truck Stop Killer, is an American serial killer and rapist. He was convicted for three murders, but it is estimated that he is responsible for dozens more.

10662260.title: Judge Judy
10662260.description: A teen who smashed out a man's car window says she was defending herself after nearly being run over. Then, a woman says her sister keyed her car.

10662342.title: Judge Judy
10662342.description: A woman says her ex's girlfriend keyed her car and bit her arm. Then, a man wants his ex to repay him for the car he helped her to buy.

10663210.title: Judge Judy
10663210.description: A dog's owner sues for veterinary bills after a teen hits it with a motorcycle.

10663269.title: The Day I Should Have Died
10663269.description: Declan Brady was on a flight from London to Belfast when the engine failed and the aircraft crashed. He managed to escape and get himself to safety.

10663448.title: Operation Repo
10663448.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10664299.title: Operation Repo
10664299.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10664428.title: Judge Judy
10664428.description: Ex-roommates argue over personal property, an arrest and the disappearance of valuable anime action-figures.
